_meta.title: OmegaX Protocol — Italy Post-Stroke Rehabilitation Actuarial Model
_meta.author: OmegaX Health devnet fixture
_meta.condition: Ischemic / Hemorrhagic Stroke — Post-Acute Neurological Rehabilitation

clinicalRationale.neuroplasticityWindow: Peak neuroplastic recovery occurs in the 6 months following the acute ischemic or hemorrhagic event. Intensive, multidisciplinary rehabilitation initiated early and sustained through this window maximises functional regain.
rehabilitationDisciplines: Physiotherapy (PT) — motor function, balance, gait, spasticity management
Speech and Language Therapy (SLT) — aphasia, dysarthria, dysphagia
Occupational Therapy (OT) — ADL retraining, cognitive rehabilitation, assistive technology
clinicalRationale.outcomeMeasure: Barthel Index (BI) — 20-item functional independence scale (0-100). Score ≥75 indicates modified independence and is the primary reimbursement gate.
clinicalRationale.healthAlphaNote: BI ≥75 maps to healthAlphaScore 7500. Oracle attests score at 180-day endpoint.

phase2_facility.label: Neurorehabilitation Facility
phase2_facility.note: 200 EUR/day includes all therapies, accommodation, meals, and nursing. Italian private neurorehab range: 180–250 EUR/day.

phase3_home.label: Home Multidisciplinary Rehabilitation
phase3_home.note: 3-discipline home programme reflecting multisystem impact of stroke. Differs from orthopaedic plans (PT only). SLT rate slightly higher reflecting specialist scarcity.

phaseSummary.phase: Acute hospital (7 days, private stroke unit)

basic.intendedFor: Supplementary top-up; assumes SSN covers facility and home phases

standard.intendedFor: Mid-tier — covers most of the critical neuroplasticity window

full.coveredPhases: All 3 phases including multidisciplinary home rehab
full.intendedFor: Full protection — covers entire 180-day neuroplasticity rehabilitation window

actuarialModel.note_utilization: 3% vs 5% for orthopaedic plans — stroke is non-elective but rarer, unpredictable onset, and higher severity filter reduces claiming cohort.
actuarialModel.formula: premium = ceil((n × utilization × maxReimbursable × (1 + buffer)) / n)

sponsorSeed.rationale: One-time seed covers approximately 30% of annual expected payout across tiers (basic 26400 + standard 37000 + full 52800 ≈ rounded to 87000). Supplements premium float in early pool growth phase.

lpBackstop.rationale: 5% weight (500 bps) — highest weighting in the ortho+neuro portfolio, reflecting the highest per-claim exposure (30220 EUR). Covers ~2 additional full-100% claims above expected utilization: 2 × 30220 = 60440 ≈ 60000.

oracleCheckpoints.attestation: Hospital discharge summary + acute stroke severity score (NIHSS ≤ 15 for facility admission)
Barthel Index interim score + therapy compliance report
Facility discharge + Barthel Index ≥ 60 (minimum for home rehab eligibility)
Community therapist compliance logs — PT + SLT + OT session counts

oracleCheckpoints.event: Final outcome attestation — neuroplasticity window close
oracleCheckpoints.attestation: Barthel Index ≥ 75 → triggers healthAlphaScore 7500 and final settlement

earlyWarningSignals.action: Flag for enhanced monitoring; premium loading review at 30-day checkpoint
Clinical review — potential extended facility stay beyond 75 days; obligation re-valuation
SLT sessions may increase beyond modelled 16; oracle data-attest event triggered
Phase 3 home transition blocked; facility extension costs reviewed against plan cap

crossPlanComparison._note: All 4 Italian rehabilitation plans on OmegaX devnet, sorted by total cost

plans.keyDifference: 180-day cycle (vs 90d orthopaedic), multidisciplinary home phase, lower utilization rate (non-elective / unpredictable onset), highest absolute cost per claim

regulatoryContext.italy_ssn: Servizio Sanitario Nazionale covers acute stroke hospitalisation and a portion of facility rehabilitation. Private plans fill gaps in: speed of access, facility quality, duration extensions, and home therapy intensity.
regulatoryContext.drg_reference: DRG 14 (Ictus specifico non TIA) — SSN base rate approximately 4500-6000 EUR for acute admission. Private supplement covers delta to 11000 EUR.
regulatoryContext.lei_reporting: On-chain oracle attestations (Barthel Index scores, therapy logs) serve as verifiable compliance records, compatible with future EU Health Data Space (EHDS) reporting frameworks.
